title: Flocks Pro Upgrade
description: Complete cloud account login, upgrade application, and upgrade execution locally.

errors.startBinding: Failed to start cloud account login
errors.exchangeBinding: Failed to complete cloud login callback
errors.unbindBinding: Failed to log out cloud account

binding.title: Cloud Account Login
binding.description: Start login locally, sign in on cloud portal, and return to local confirmation.
binding.missingAccountHint: Current session does not include account name, please log out and log in again.

upgrade.description: Submit application, track approval status, and manually refresh status.

upgrade.pendingRequestExists: An upgrade request is already active. Refresh status or cancel it before creating a new one.

upgrade.afterUpgradeHint: After upgrade completes, stop OSS process and launch from the Flocks Pro install path.
upgrade.formRequiredError: Company and applicant name are required

audit.title: Audit Logs
audit.description: Review Pro audit events with filters for event type, actor, and time range.

errors.forbidden: Only admins can view audit logs
errors.unavailable: Audit logs are not available in this edition
